verified_query_file.description: Relative path to a LOCAL, gitignored sidecar holding the blessed read-only SQL the analyst confirmed (the answer key) — conventionally evals/verified/<seed-name>.sql. The SQL body is deliberately kept out of git: it goes stale fast and must not be cloneable from the repo. The seed (question/intent/expected/value+as_of) stays committed and is the durable ground truth; only the SQL lives in the sidecar. Set only on a verified match; omit otherwise.
